title: To One Unsatisfied
content:
When, with all the loved around thee,
        Still thy heart says, "I am lonely,"
    It is well; the truth hath found thee:
        Rest is with the Father only.
meaning:
"To One Unsatisfied" is a quintessential example of George MacDonald's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
